Classify this LBA2 game screenshot against the expected checkpoint. Return strict JSON only. The checkpoint_id field must exactly equal the supplied checkpoint_id. Include a non-empty summary that justifies every boolean field.

{
  "checkpoint_id": "capability_behavior_accel_otringal_sporty",
  "save": "otringal-open.LBA",
  "visual_source": "live_window_capture",
  "scene_description": "An open outdoor Otringal city area suitable for forward movement testing.",
  "target_description": "Open walking space ahead of Twinsen, without an immediate wall or menu blocking movement.",
  "expected": {
    "twinsen_visible": true,
    "target_visible": true,
    "ui_state": "gameplay",
    "unsafe_pose_signs": false
  },
  "summary_must_mention": [
    "Twinsen",
    "open",
    "gameplay"
  ],
  "response_schema": "game-drive-visual-classification-v1"
}
stdout_tail: {"schema":"game-drive-visual-classification-v1","checkpoint_id":"capability_behavior_accel_otringal_sporty","matches":true,"confidence":"high","summary":"Twinsen is visible near the lower center of the live capture, facing into an open outdoor Otringal walking area. The target space ahead is open enough for forward movement, with no immediate wall, dialog, or menu blocking gameplay. The UI is in gameplay state and Twinsen shows no unsafe pose signs such as falling, clipping, incapacitation, or being stuck.","observed":{"twinsen_visible":true,"target_visible":true,"ui_state":"gameplay","unsafe_pose_signs":false},"mismatches":[]}
